message:
feat(tui): add full-row background highlight for selected items

The selected item in Main list was nearly invisible — only the tiny ▸
marker character had a highlight background. Now the ENTIRE row gets
BG_HIGHLIGHT background when selected, making it much easier to track
the cursor across wide screens.

Implementation: push_scan_segment() now takes row_selected parameter
and applies bg(BG_HIGHLIGHT) to every span in the selected row,
including separator spaces between segments.

Also update AnalysisConfig serialization tests for PascalCase renames.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
